about.subtitle: CIMA approved broker since 2009, Humanis Insurance supports over 500 companies and individuals in protecting their most precious assets. Our recognized expertise in brokerage, risk management and international programs makes us the trusted partner of major Cameroonian companies.

manufacturing.quote: Humanis has been supporting us for 5 years. Their risk management expertise allowed us to optimize our insurance costs by 25% while improving our coverage.
manufacturing.author: Marie Ngono

transport.quote: Exceptional service and remarkable responsiveness. The Humanis team perfectly understands the challenges of Cameroonian SMEs.
transport.author: Paul Mendomo

agriculture.quote: Thanks to Humanis, we have implemented comprehensive international coverage for our expatriates. A trusted partner.
agriculture.author: Jean-Claude Eyoum
